# Data Dictionary — Dataset A: Python Warm-up

**File:** `data/processed/dataset_A_python_warmup.csv`
**Source:** Fully synthetic (generated by `build_datasets.py`, seed=42)
**Rows:** 50 | **Columns:** 8

| Column | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `customer_id` | string | Unique customer identifier (CUST-001 to CUST-050) |
| `age_group` | categorical | Age bracket: 18-25, 26-35, 36-45, 46-55, 56+ |
| `region` | categorical | Geographic region: North, South, East, West |
| `product_type` | categorical | Banking product: Savings, Current, Investment, Loan |
| `monthly_balance` | float | Average monthly account balance in EUR (200–50 000) |
| `monthly_transactions` | integer | Number of transactions in the last month (1–79) |
| `fee_paid` | float | Total fees paid in the last month in EUR (0–120) |
| `digital_channel_flag` | integer (0/1) | 1 = uses digital banking, 0 = does not |

## Notes
- All columns are synthetic. No real customer data.
- Designed for very first Python exercises: loading, filtering, grouping, simple plots.
- No missing values by design.
